title: A kind of spherical integral type wind and solar hybrid generating system and …
abstract_clean: The invention discloses a spherical integrated wind-solar hybrid power generation system and method, comprising a wind turbine, a solar photovoltaic panel, a wind-solar hybrid controller, a load, a battery pack and a sensor; The solar photovoltaic panel and the sensor are connected and controlled; the wind-solar hybrid controller is also connected with the battery pack to perform charge and discharge control; the battery pack is connected with the load to supply power. The photovoltaic power generation device and the wind power generation device are reasonably combined, and the solar panel is transformed and fixed on the wind turbine blade, wherein the blade is designed to be arc-shaped and evenly encircled into a spherical structure, so as to realize the integrated power generation of wind energy and solar energy, effectively It solves the problems of low stability of the wind and light single power generation system, large volume and scattered installation of the traditional wind-solar hybrid device, and the wind-solar power generation system is greatly affected by the illumination angle and wind direction.
claims_clean: 1.一种球状一体式风光互补发电系统，其特征在于，包括：太阳能光伏板(201)、风力发电机(202)、风光互补控制器(203)、蓄电池组(204)和传感器；所述风光互补控制器(203)分别与所述太阳能光伏板(201)、风力发电机(202)以及所述传感器相连，并对它们进行控制；所述风光互补控制器(203)还与所述蓄电池组(204)相连，对其进行充放电控制；所述蓄电池组(204)与所述负载相连为其供电。1. A spherical integrated wind-solar hybrid power generation system, characterized in that it comprises: a solar photovoltaic panel (201), a wind turbine (202), a wind-solar hybrid controller (203), a battery pack (204) and a sensor; the The wind-solar hybrid controller (203) is respectively connected with the solar photovoltaic panel (201), the wind generator (202) and the sensor, and controls them; the wind-solar hybrid controller (203) is also connected with the battery The battery group (204) is connected to control the charge and discharge; the storage battery group (204) is connected to the load to supply power.

2.根据权利要求1所述的一种球状一体式风光互补发电系统，其特征在于，所述风力发电机(201)包括：风力机、传动机构、发电机；所述风力机包括N片圆弧形叶片，所述N片叶片均匀围成近似球状，固定在风力机垂直轴的上下两端；所述风力机垂直轴通过传动机构与所述发电机相连；在空气动能推动风力机旋转时，通过传动机构驱动发电机转动将机械能转换成电能。2. The spherical integrated wind-solar hybrid power generation system according to claim 1, wherein the wind turbine (201) comprises: a wind turbine, a transmission mechanism, and a generator; the wind turbine comprises an N-piece circle Arc-shaped blades, the N blades are evenly surrounded into an approximate spherical shape, and are fixed on the upper and lower ends of the vertical axis of the wind turbine; the vertical axis of the wind turbine is connected with the generator through a transmission mechanism; when the air kinetic energy drives the wind turbine to rotate , the mechanical energy is converted into electrical energy by driving the generator to rotate through the transmission mechanism.

3.根据权利要求2所述的一种球状一体式风光互补发电系统，其特征在于，所述太阳能光伏板由若干太阳能电池板并联组成，所述太阳能光伏板与所述圆弧形叶片同等面积大小并紧密贴合在风力机的叶片上；在叶片受到风力作用转动时，能够带动太阳能光伏板跟随进行360 旋转。3 . The spherical integrated wind-solar hybrid power generation system according to claim 2 , wherein the solar photovoltaic panel is composed of several solar cell panels in parallel, and the solar photovoltaic panel has the same area as the arc-shaped blade. 4 . The size of the wind turbine is closely attached to the blade of the wind turbine; when the blade is rotated by the wind, it can drive the solar photovoltaic panel to follow the 360 rotation.

4.根据权利要求1所述的一种球状一体式风光互补发电系统，其特征在于，所述风光互补控制器包括整流电路、DC/DC变换电路、充放电控制电路、最大功率追踪电路和保护电路。4. A spherical integrated wind-solar hybrid power generation system according to claim 1, wherein the wind-solar hybrid controller comprises a rectifier circuit, a DC/DC conversion circuit, a charge-discharge control circuit, a maximum power tracking circuit and a protection circuit circuit.

5.根据权利要求4所述的一种球状一体式风光互补发电系统，其特征在于，所述风光互补控制器连接所述风力发电机，用于将所述风力发电机产生的交流电经整流电路整流并经DC/DC转换电路变为可供所述蓄电池组充电的直流电；所述风光互补控制器连接所述太阳能光伏板，用于将所述太阳能光伏板产生的直流电经DC/DC转换电路变为可供所述蓄电池组充电的直流电；所述风光互补控制器连接所述蓄电池组，由充放电控制电路控制将系统产生的电能给所述蓄电池组充电，也用于控制所述蓄电池组给所述负载供电；所述风光互补控制器连接所述传感器，所述传感器能够监测发电装置所处环境的风速、温度以及光照强度，在监测值超过安全值时进行安全控制动作。5 . The spherical integrated wind-solar hybrid power generation system according to claim 4 , wherein the wind-solar hybrid controller is connected to the wind turbine for rectifying the alternating current generated by the wind turbine through a rectifier circuit. 6 . rectified and converted into direct current for charging the battery pack through a DC/DC conversion circuit; the wind-solar hybrid controller is connected to the solar photovoltaic panel for converting the direct current generated by the solar photovoltaic panel through the DC/DC conversion circuit The wind-solar hybrid controller is connected to the battery pack, and the charging and discharging control circuit controls the electrical energy generated by the system to charge the battery pack, and is also used to control the battery pack supplying power to the load; the wind-solar hybrid controller is connected to the sensor, the sensor can monitor the wind speed, temperature and light intensity of the environment where the power generating device is located, and performs a safety control action when the monitored value exceeds a safe value.

6.根据权利要求4所述的一种球状一体式风光互补发电系统，其特征在于，所述风光互补控制器的最大功率追踪电路通过对风力发电机输出电压和电流的监测与采集得到发电系统输出的功率，调节实现风力发电机组的最大功率跟踪，具体地：在风速变化时，通过测量风机转速，将该风机转速所对应的最大功率与实际功率比较，所述风光互补控制器通过调节DC/DC变换电路的触发脉冲占空比来调整风机实际转速，使其始终运行在最佳转速上，实现风力发电机的最大功率输出。6 . The spherical integrated wind-solar hybrid power generation system according to claim 4 , wherein the maximum power tracking circuit of the wind-solar hybrid controller obtains the power generation system by monitoring and collecting the output voltage and current of the wind turbine. 7 . The output power is adjusted to realize the maximum power tracking of the wind turbine. Specifically: when the wind speed changes, by measuring the fan speed, the maximum power corresponding to the fan speed is compared with the actual power, and the wind-solar hybrid controller adjusts the DC The trigger pulse duty ratio of the /DC conversion circuit adjusts the actual speed of the fan, so that it always runs at the optimal speed and realizes the maximum power output of the wind turbine.

7.根据权利要求4所述的一种球状一体式风光互补发电系统，其特征在于，所述风光互补控制器的最大功率追踪电路通过控制DC/DC转换电路的触发脉冲占空比，调节太阳能光伏板最大输出功率，具体地：利用戴维南定理中外部负载等效阻抗与电源内阻抗成共扼时，外部负载输出最大功率的原理，所述风光互补控制器通过调节DC/DC直流变换电路中开关器件的触发脉冲占空比来实现外部阻抗变化，使之在不同环境下始终跟随太阳能光伏板的内阻变化，两者动态负载满足共轭条件时即可实现太阳能的最大功率跟踪。7 . The spherical integrated wind-solar hybrid power generation system according to claim 4 , wherein the maximum power tracking circuit of the wind-solar hybrid controller adjusts the solar energy by controlling the duty cycle of the trigger pulse of the DC/DC conversion circuit. 8 . The maximum output power of the photovoltaic panel, specifically: using the principle of the maximum power output by the external load when the equivalent impedance of the external load and the internal impedance of the power supply are conjugated in Thevenin's theorem, the wind-solar hybrid controller can adjust the DC/DC conversion circuit by adjusting the DC/DC conversion circuit. The trigger pulse duty cycle of the switching device realizes the change of the external impedance, so that it always follows the change of the internal resistance of the solar photovoltaic panel in different environments, and the maximum power tracking of the solar energy can be realized when the dynamic loads of the two meet the conjugate condition.

8.根据权利要求4所述的一种球状一体式风光互补发电系统，其特征在于，所述风光互补控制器的保护电路实现超速保护功能，在外界风速超过极限值时，给风力发电机提供反向转矩，降低发电机的转速，避免超速或飞车；所述保护电路还对蓄电池的电压值和电荷状态的实时采样与检测来判断蓄电池的状态，管理和控制蓄电池的充放电过程，防止过充或过放等情况的发生。8 . The spherical integrated wind-solar hybrid power generation system according to claim 4 , wherein the protection circuit of the wind-solar hybrid controller realizes an overspeed protection function, and when the external wind speed exceeds a limit value, it provides the wind turbine with 8 . Reverse torque, reduce the speed of the generator, avoid overspeed or speeding; the protection circuit also judges the state of the battery by real-time sampling and detection of the voltage value and state of charge of the battery, manages and controls the charging and discharging process of the battery, and prevents The occurrence of overcharge or overdischarge.

9.根据权利要求1所述的一种球状一体式风光互补发电系统，其特征在于，所述风力发电机采用永磁同步电机；所述传感器包括风速传感器、温度传感器、光照传感器。9 . The spherical integrated wind-solar hybrid power generation system according to claim 1 , wherein the wind generator adopts a permanent magnet synchronous motor; and the sensors include a wind speed sensor, a temperature sensor, and a light sensor. 10 .

10.根据权利要求1-9任一项所述的一种球状一体式风光互补发电系统的发电方法，其特征在于，发电系统运行时，圆弧形风机叶片绕着垂直的旋转轴随风360 水平转动，圆弧形叶片上的太阳能电池板始终有至少一半的区域暴露在太阳光照射下；此时，风力发电部分由风力机叶片捕获风能，带动风力机旋转，经过传动机构，驱动同旋转轴上的交流永磁同步发电机，风力发电机输出的交流电经过整流电路和DC/DC变换电路转换成蓄电池充电所需的直流电，风光互补控制器通过调节DC/DC变换电路的触发脉冲占空比从而调整风机转速使其输出最大功率；光伏发电部分由太阳能光伏板捕获太阳能，太阳能光伏板输出的直流电经过DC/DC变换电路转换成蓄电池充电所需的直流电，风光互补控制器通过改变DC/DC变换电路的触发脉冲占空比来使太阳能光伏板输出最大功率；风力发电和光伏发电可以单独或一起向蓄电池及负载供电；蓄电池不仅用于储存风能和太阳能产生的电能，当产生的电能不足以维持负载的运行时，蓄电池也用于补充不足的电能；风光互补控制器控制风能和太阳能的最大功率输出和蓄电池的充放电管理的同时，也监测系统运行过程中电流、电压、风机转速等参数，配合风速传感器、温度传感器、光照传感器监测系统运行环境参数，在监测值超过安全值时进行安全控制动作，为系统安全稳定的运行提供警报和保护功能。10. The power generation method of a spherical integrated wind-solar hybrid power generation system according to any one of claims 1-9, characterized in that, when the power generation system is running, the arc-shaped fan blades follow the wind 360 around the vertical axis of rotation. Horizontal rotation, at least half of the solar panels on the arc-shaped blades are always exposed to sunlight; at this time, the wind power generation part captures wind energy by the wind turbine blades, drives the wind turbine to rotate, and drives the same through the transmission mechanism. The AC permanent magnet synchronous generator on the rotating shaft, the AC power output by the wind turbine is converted into the DC power required for battery charging through the rectifier circuit and the DC/DC conversion circuit. The air ratio can adjust the speed of the fan to output the maximum power; the photovoltaic power generation part is captured by the solar photovoltaic panel, and the direct current output by the solar photovoltaic panel is converted into the direct current required for battery charging through the DC/DC conversion circuit, and the wind-solar hybrid controller changes the DC The trigger pulse duty cycle of the /DC conversion circuit enables the solar photovoltaic panel to output the maximum power; the wind power generation and photovoltaic power generation can supply power to the battery and the load individually or together; the battery is not only used to store the electrical energy generated by wind and solar energy, but also When it is not enough to maintain the operation of the load, the battery is also used to supplement the insufficient electric energy; the wind-solar hybrid controller controls the maximum power output of wind energy and solar energy and the charge and discharge management of the battery, and also monitors the current, voltage and fan speed during the operation of the system. and other parameters, cooperate with the wind speed sensor, temperature sensor, light sensor to monitor the operating environment parameters of the system, and perform safety control actions when the monitoring value exceeds the safe value, providing alarm and protection functions for the safe and stable operation of the system.
description_clean:
A kind of spherical integral type wind and solar hybrid generating system and method
Technical field
The present invention relates to wind and solar hybrid generating system and electricity-generating methods, more particularly to a kind of novel spherical integral type scene
Complementary power generation system and method belong to wind light generation technical field.
Background technique
With the development of economy and society, electric power increasingly becomes essential power resources in people's life, it is same with this
When, energy consumption and environmental pollution are always to perplex the key point of people.Find other energy conversion regimes and development and utilization
New energy is the developing direction of national future source of energy policy.In recent years, the utilization of renewable energy worldwide obtains fast
Speed development, wind energy and solar energy are as pollution-free, high-environmental renewable new energy, by the favor of numerous people, but wind
It can the disadvantages of that all there is energy densities is low, and energy stability is poor with solar energy.Solar energy generating efficiency is by time, environment, day
The limitation of many factors such as gasï¼Though wind energy and inexhaustible new energy, due to the wind-force in wind energy with
The variability of machine and wind direction, the unstability of this energy cause the utilization efficiency of wind energy relatively low.In view of solar energy with
Wind energy has very strong complementarity in time and geographically, and general dry monsoon is big but solar radiation is small, and summer intensity of illumination is big
And wind is small, if can combine both, has complementary advantages, it will be able to overcome and solve their own insufficient and defect.It is comprehensive
Wind-power electricity generation and photovoltaic power generation technology are reasonably combined the wind light mutual complementing power generation system of composition by the advantages of closing solar energy and wind energy
System, undoubtedly solves independently-powered preferred plan.
Wind and solar hybrid generating system has apparent advantage compared with individual wind-power electricity generation or photovoltaic generating system.It is first
First, using the complementarity of wind energy and solar energy, more stable total output can be obtained, electricity generation system stability and reliability obtain
To raisingï¼Secondly, in the case where guaranteeing same power supply, energy storage battery capacity needed for wind and solar hybrid generating system relative to
Single wind-force or solar power system greatly reduceï¼Finally, under the weather conditions such as rainy weather or wind-force deficiency, with two
The kind energy can form complementation, ensure that continuous reliable power supply, generate good economic results in society.Based on this, this hair
Bright to provide a kind of novel spherical integral type wind and solar hybrid generating system and method, the structure is by solar energy photovoltaic panel and blower leaf
Piece transformation combines, and the design of spherical integral type has well solved that traditional wind-light complementing power generation device occupied space is big and needs
The problem of constantly adjusting design factors according to wind direction and sunlight irradiating angle, and generating efficiency with higher.
Patent " a kind of wind and solar hybrid generating system " [number of patent application: 201710610534.X, publication number:
CN107276497 A], disclose a kind of wind and solar hybrid generating system.The invention includes wind generator system, photovoltaic power generation system
System, controller, inverter, battery group realize the reasonable benefit to new energy using the complementarity of solar energy and wind energy substantially
With, wind power generation plant uses horizontal-shaft wind turbine in the invention, need constantly to adjust the direction blade of wind energy conversion system according to wind direction,
Particularly as be when wind vane with wind vector to some angle when, wind vane drives balancing point contact pressure switch, triggers cylinder
Movement, makes fan blade rotate to respective angles.But the cylinder in the invention needs device to power for it, increases electric energy
Consumptionï¼The process of fan blade box haul mark direction change is mainly adjusted by four equally distributed fixed cylinders, degree of regulation
It is limited, and wind direction has unstability, can not often adjust blade into best wind direction rangeï¼Meanwhile the invention utilizes cylinder
The method for adjusting direction, which only reaches 3 grades in wind-force, to be acted, and under small wind environment, wind power generation efficiency is extremely low.
Patent " a kind of wind and solar hybrid generating system that new-generation is high-efficient " [number of patent application: 201610870181.2,
Publication number: 106253802 A of CN].Transmission mechanism can be driven by motor in different time sections in being mainly characterized by of the invention,
Change the inclination angle of solar panel square matrix, it is basic to realize that photovoltaic array is in optimum angle of incidence, receive the sun as much as possible
It can radiation.But three periods have simply been distinguished in the invention, still have the most of the time to be not at optimum angle of incidence, and different
The season optimum angle of incidence of each period solar panel square matrix can also have differences, therefore the raising of solar energy generating efficiency
It measures limited.Secondly as the inclination angle of solar panel square matrix needs the electricity with remote control device and intelligence control system
Machine is adjusted, and the speed reducer that also to arrange in pairs or groups as needed is used in conjunction with, not only control requires high, also relative increase at
This, economic benefit is not also significant.
Summary of the invention
It is an object of the invention to solve the problems in technical background, a kind of novel spherical integral type wind light mutual complementing is provided
Electricity generation system and method, the system get up photovoltaic power generation apparatus and wind power generation plant reasonable combination, by solar panel
It is transformed and is fixed on blade of wind-driven generator, realize the integrated power generation of wind energy and solar energy, efficiently solve wind, light list
One electricity generation system stability is not high, and traditional wind-solar hybrid device volume is big and installation disperses, wind and light generating system light irradiation angle
The problem of being affected with wind direction.
The technical scheme is that a kind of novel spherical integral type wind and solar hybrid generating system, mainly includes wind-force
Generator, solar energy photovoltaic panel, wind/light complementation controller, load, battery group and sensor.The wind/light complementation controller point
It is not connected with the wind-driven generator, the solar energy photovoltaic panel and the sensor, and controls itï¼The scene
Complementary controller, which is also connected with the battery group, carries out charge and discharge control to itï¼The battery group is connected to the load
It is powered.The function of various pieces is as follows:
The parts such as the wind-driven generator, including wind energy conversion system, transmission mechanism, generator, aerodynamic energy push wind energy conversion system rotation
Turn, is converted into the mechanical energy of wind wheel rotation, electric energy is converted mechanical energy by transmission mechanism driven generator.Wherein wind energy conversion system
Including N piece circular arc vane, blade surrounds the upper and lower ends that approximate sphericity is fixed on vertical axis, and this special blade construction is taken
Leaf harvest can be made to the wind energy of any direction with vertical axis windmill, be rotated around 360 of vertical axis level, be not required to wind direction
Regulating device adjustment direction blade makes it towards windward side.
The solar energy photovoltaic panel is composed in parallel by several solar panels, is converted solar energy using photovoltaic effect
For direct current, wherein solar energy photovoltaic panel is made into and the same size of blade and is fitted tightly on pneumatic equipment bladess, blade
It is acted on and rotating by wind-force, solar energy photovoltaic panel and then rotates 360 .
The battery group, is made of muti-piece battery, for storing the electric energy of electricity generation system generation, while can be direct
Connection DC load connects AC load by inverter.
The wind/light complementation controller is the control core of system, including rectification circuit, DC/DC translation circuit, charge and discharge
Control circuit, maximum power tracing circuit and protection circuit.The wind/light complementation controller main function is connection, combination power generation
System various pieces control the charge and discharge of wind energy, solar energy and battery, maximum power tracing and system protection etc..It is described
Wind/light complementation controller connects the wind-driven generator, and the rectified circuit of alternating current for generating the wind-driven generator is whole
It flows and becomes through DC/DC conversion circuit for the direct current of the battery chargingï¼The wind/light complementation controller connects institute
Solar energy photovoltaic panel is stated, the direct current for generating the solar energy photovoltaic panel becomes through DC/DC conversion circuit for described
The direct current of battery chargingï¼The wind/light complementation controller connects the battery group, is controlled by charge-discharge control circuit
The electric energy that system is generated gives the battery charging, is also used for controlling the battery group to the load supplyingï¼It is described
Wind/light complementation controller connects the sensor, the sensor can monitor the wind speed of power generator local environment, temperature with
And intensity of illumination, relevant action is just carried out more than safety value.
According to above-mentioned electricity generation system, electricity-generating method of the invention and process are as follows:
When operation of electric power system, arc-shaped fan blade horizontally rotates for 360 with the wind around vertical rotary shaft, arc-shaped
Solar panel on blade has at least half of region to be exposed under sunlight irradiation alwaysï¼Meanwhile wind power generation part
Wind energy is captured by pneumatic equipment bladess, drives wind energy conversion system rotation, by transmission mechanism, is driven with the alternating-current synchronous in rotary shaft
The alternating current of generator, wind-driven generator output is converted into needed for battery charging by rectification circuit and DC/DC translation circuit
Direct current, wind/light complementation controller by control DC/DC converter trigger pulse duty ratio come make blower export maximum work
Rateï¼Photovoltaic power generation part captures solar energy by solar energy photovoltaic panel, and the direct current of solar energy photovoltaic panel output is converted by DC/DC
The trigger pulse that circuit conversion passes through control DC/DC converter at direct current needed for battery charging, wind/light complementation controller
Duty ratio makes photovoltaic panel Maximum Power Outputï¼Wind-power electricity generation and photovoltaic power generation can be supplied to battery and load individually or together
Electricityï¼The electric energy that battery is applied not only to storage wind energy and solar energy generates, when the electric energy of generation is not enough to maintain the operation of load
When, battery is also used for supplementing insufficient electric energyï¼Wind/light complementation controller control wind energy and solar energy maximum power output and
While the management of charging and discharging of battery, the parameters such as electric current, voltage, rotation speed of fan in system operation are also monitored, wind is cooperated
Fast sensor, temperature sensor, optical sensor monitor system running environment parameter, are pacified when monitor value is more than safety value
Full control action safely and steadily runs for system and provides alarm and defencive function.
The advantages and positive effects of the present invention are:
1) wind and solar hybrid generating system of the invention is spherical integral structure, different from traditional structure separate type sun
The blade of wind power generation plant and solar panel are bonded and are made into approximate sphericity by energy and wind power generation system, the present invention
Integral structure has simplified wind-light complementing power generation device structure well, reduces volume, and effectively save cost has good
Economic benefitï¼
2) wind energy conversion system is made into the chondritic that N piece arc shaped blade closely surrounds by wind power generation plant of the invention, can be with
The wind energy for receiving any direction does not need to have as conventional wind power generator as wind direction adjusts fan blade direction
Very strong Wind energy extraction ability and wind direction adaptability.
3) solar panel of the invention is fitted tightly on the arc shaped blade of wind energy conversion system, and blower rotation generates electricity and drives
Solar panel rotation, can guarantee sunlight at any time can sufficiently be irradiated to a photovoltaic panel at least semi-area, no
With the inclination angle for constantly adjusting solar array according to sunlight irradiating angle as traditional device of solar generating.
4) wind electricity generating system and device of solar generating are designed to novel spherical integral structure by the present invention, can be made
The power generation gross efficiency of wind and solar hybrid generating system improves at least 20%.
Detailed description of the invention
 is whole functional block diagram of the invention.
 is the device of the invention structural schematic diagram.
In figure: 201: solar energy photovoltaic panelï¼202: wind-driven generatorï¼203: wind/light complementation controllerï¼204: battery groupï¼
205: load.
Specific embodiment
It is further described with reference to the accompanying drawing with example for the present invention.
The present invention is a kind of novel spherical integral type wind and solar hybrid generating system, whole functional block diagram as shown in Figure 1,
Spherical integral type wind and solar hybrid generating system mainly includes solar energy photovoltaic panel 201, wind-driven generator 202, wind light mutual complementing control
Device 203, battery group 204, load, sensor 205.The wind/light complementation controller 203 respectively with the wind-driven generator
202, the solar energy photovoltaic panel 201 is connected with the sensor, and controls itï¼The wind/light complementation controller 203
Also it is connected with the battery group 204 and charge and discharge control is carried out to itï¼The battery group 204 is connected to the load 205
It is powered.
According to , the wind-driven generator 202 include vertical rotary shaft, installation wind energy conversion system on the rotary shaft,
N piece circular arc vane, transmission mechanism, generator, the patty pedestal to support rotary shaft and wind-driven generator.The wind-force
The working principle of generator 202 is: the present apparatus is mounted on the outdoor biggish region of roof wind-force, and circular arc vane is by wind-force level
Aerodynamic energy, is converted into the mechanical energy of fan blade rotation by 360 of rotations, and the vertical axis of rotation is connected with transmission mechanism, passes through transmission
Mechanical energy is changed into alternating current using electromagnetic induction principle, converted by rectifier by the rotation of mechanism driven generator, generator
At direct current, then the direct current of fixed voltage needed for being converted to battery charging through DC/DC converter, it is achieved in wind
The electric energy that power generator generates is stored into battery.N piece circular arc vane equably surrounds approximate sphericity, is fixedly mounted on vertical
The upper and lower ends of d-axis, this special blade construction collocation vertical axis windmill can make leaf harvest to the wind of any direction
Can, push wind energy conversion system to rotate around vertical rotation axis horizontal, without adjusting direction blade according to wind direction.Generator selects volume
The high permanent magnet synchronous motor of smaller cost performance, generator are connected by transmission mechanism with wind energy conversion system, and the support of pedestal is fixedly mounted on
On diskï¼
The solar energy photovoltaic panel 201 is fitted tightly on N piece circular arc vane with parallel way, its working principle is that:
Solar battery is made of semiconductor, has a large amount of PN junction inside semiconductor material, when solar irradiation is mapped to solar battery
On plate, light induced electron and hole are separated, and the accumulation of heterocharge occur in battery both ends, i.e. generation " photovoltage ", if too
Positive energy battery board ends connect circuit, just will form electric current, to obtain power output.The present invention utilizes photovoltaic effect directly will
Solar energy is converted to direct current, then the direct current of battery charging is become available for through DC/DC conversion circuit.Wherein, solar energy
Volt plate 201 is made into be fitted tightly on blade with the same size of blade, when blade is acted on rotation by wind-force, solar energy
Volt plate 201 and then rotates 360 , and the irradiating angle regardless of sunlight, solar energy photovoltaic panel 201 always has at least half
Sunlight irradiation, without changing solar panel according to sunlight irradiating angle as traditional device of solar generating
Inclination angle.
The battery group 204, is made of muti-piece battery, for storing the electric energy of electricity generation system generation, while can be with
It is directly connected to DC load or AC load is connected by inverter.When the electric energy of wind-light complementing power generation device output is not enough to
When maintaining the operation of load, battery is powered for it, conversely, when the output electric energy of wind-driven generator and solar panel still has
Plentiful, then battery stores these electric energy.
The wind/light complementation controller 203, is the control core of system, including rectification circuit, DC/DC translation circuit, is filled
Charge/discharge control circuit, maximum power tracing circuit and protection circuit.The wind/light complementation controller main function is connection, combination
Electricity generation system various pieces control the charge and discharge of wind energy, solar energy and battery, maximum power tracing and system protection etc..
Further, the wind/light complementation controller 203 connects the wind-driven generator 202, for sending out the wind-force
The AC rectification of the generation of motor 202 simultaneously becomes through DC/DC conversion circuit for the direct current of the battery chargingï¼Work as wind
One timing of speed, there is always an optimum speeds to keep wind energy conversion system output power maximum for wind-driven generator, therefore different wind speed apparatus for lower wind
The curve that the Maximum Power Output point of machine is linked to be is the peak power output curve of wind-driven generator.In wind speed variation, lead to
Measurement rotation speed of fan is crossed, by maximum power corresponding to the rotation speed of fan compared with actual power, the wind/light complementation controller
203 adjust blower actual speed by adjusting the trigger pulse duty ratio of DC/DC translation circuit, operate in it always most preferably
On revolving speed, the maximum power output of wind-driven generator is realized.The maximum power tracing circuit of the wind/light complementation controller according to
To the power of the monitoring and the electricity generation system output collected of wind-driven generator output voltage and electric current, adjusts and realize wind-force hair
The maximal power tracing of motor groupï¼The wind/light complementation controller realizes over-speed protection function using protection circuit, once it is extraneous
Wind speed over-limit condition provides opposing torque to generator, to reduce the revolving speed of generator, avoids hypervelocity or driving, improves
The safety of systemï¼
Further, the wind/light complementation controller 203 connects the solar energy photovoltaic panel 201, is used for the sun
The direct current that energy photovoltaic panel 201 generates becomes the direct current to charge for the battery group 204 through DC/DC conversion circuit.By
In solar panel output voltage and electric current have nonlinear characteristic, output power also with intensity of illumination variation and
Variation, but there are a certain optimum voltage values to make solar energy photovoltaic panel Maximum Power Output.Wind/light complementation controller 203 has too
Positive energy MPPT maximum power point tracking function, maximum power tracing circuit is substantially an impedance transformer.According to Dai Weinanding
When reason, external loading equivalent impedance and the internal resistance of source are at conjugation, external loading can get peak power output.In certain sunshine
Under the conditions of condition and temperature, the output DC terminal of solar energy photovoltaic panel 201 is equivalent to DC power supply, DC/DC transformation in the present invention
Circuit equivalent is external impedance, and the wind/light complementation controller 203 is by adjusting switching device in DC/DC DC transfer circuit
Trigger pulse duty ratio come realize external impedance change, be allowed to follow the internal resistance of solar energy photovoltaic panel always under various circumstances
The maximal power tracing of solar energy can be realized in variation, the two dynamic load when meeting conjugate condition.
Further, the wind/light complementation controller 203 connects the battery group 204, straight for generating system
Galvanic electricity gives 204 power supply-charging of battery group, is also used for controlling the battery group to the load supplyingï¼And by pair
The voltage value of battery and the real-time sampling of state of charge judge the state of battery with detection, manage and control battery
Charge and discharge process, prevents from overcharging or over-discharge, so that it is guaranteed that wind and solar hybrid generating system is safe and reliable, provides
Uninterruptible powerï¼
Further, the wind/light complementation controller 203 connects the sensor, as air velocity transducer, temperature sensor,
Optical sensor, monitors wind speed, the temperature, intensity of illumination of wind-light complementing power generation device institute installation region, once detect correlation
Environmental parameter amplitude of variation is more than safety value, just carries out corresponding actions, anti-locking apparatus meets under the bad weathers such as hail or typhoon
To damageï¼
The power generation process of electricity generation system of the present invention are as follows:
When the system is operated, arc-shaped fan blade horizontally rotates for 360 with the wind around vertical rotary shaft, arc-shaped leaf
The solar panel of on piece has at least half of region to be exposed under sunlight irradiation always.At this point, wind power generation part by
Pneumatic equipment bladess capture wind energy, drive wind energy conversion system rotation, by transmission mechanism, drive with the alternating-current synchronous hair in rotary shaft
Motor, direct current needed for the alternating current of wind-driven generator output is converted into battery charging by rectifier and DC/DC converter
Electricity, wind/light complementation controller keep its defeated by adjusting the trigger pulse duty ratio of DC/DC translation circuit so as to adjust rotation speed of fan
Maximum power outï¼Photovoltaic power generation part captures solar energy by photovoltaic array, and the direct current of photovoltaic array output is converted by DC/DC
Direct current needed for device is converted into battery charging, the trigger pulse that wind/light complementation controller passes through change DC/DC translation circuit
Duty ratio makes solar energy photovoltaic panel Maximum Power Outputï¼Wind-power electricity generation and photovoltaic power generation can individually or together to battery and
Load supplyingï¼The electric energy that battery is applied not only to storage wind energy and solar energy generates, when the electric energy of generation is not enough to maintain to load
Operation when, battery is also used for supplementing insufficient electric energyï¼The maximum power output and storage of controller control wind energy and solar energy
While the management of charging and discharging of battery, the parameters such as electric current, voltage, rotation speed of fan in system operation are also monitored, wind speed is cooperated
Sensor, temperature sensor, optical sensor etc. monitor system running environment parameter, safely and steadily run for system and provide police
Report and defencive function.
